title: Flickingeria guttenbergii
taxonomy: Flickingeria guttenbergii is classified under the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, it belongs to the phylum Angiospermophyta. Within this phylum, Flickingeria guttenbergii falls under the class Liliopsida, also known as the monocotyledons. The order Orchidales is the next level of classification for this plant, and it is further divided into the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Flickingeria is a part of this orchid family, with Flickingeria guttenbergii being a specific species within this genus. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and reproductive features.
